lastCommit.message: feat: implement Local Dev Stack and Seed Baseline (attempt 2)

attempts.latestEventSummary: feature completed: Local Dev Stack and Seed Baseline in 0 attempts

reinforcementResults.name: Contract Lockstep Gate
reinforcementResults.summary: No blocking issues found for this feature. Evidence in workspace shows canonical local-dev entrypoints (`Makefile` -> `scripts/setup-dev.sh`), committed `.env.development` plus gitignored `.env.local`, compose baseline with core dependencies (`postgres`, `redis`, `minio`, `otel-collector`), and seeded lifecycle/compliance/dispute/anomaly/mapping scenarios implemented in runtime bootstrap with dedicated test coverage. The active contract policy is satisfied for this feature scope: backend changes are seed/bootstrap-focused and do not introduce API interface drift requiring OpenAPI/TS client regeneration. Note: full `make dev` stack execution was not run in this sandboxed review environment.

reinforcementResults.name: No-Legacy/Fallback Gate
reinforcementResults.summary: Pass via static review. The workspace satisfies this feature’s required baseline: `Makefile` and `scripts/setup-dev.sh` are the canonical `make dev*` entrypoints; local compose includes core stateful dependencies (`postgres`, `redis`, `minio`, `otel-collector`) with pinned images; `.env.development` is tracked while `.env.local` is gitignored; and runtime bootstrap seeds lifecycle/compliance, dispute, anomaly, and mapping scenarios (`seed_runtime_baseline_scenarios` plus assertions in `bootstrap_runtime_state_seeds_local_dev_baseline_scenarios`). No excluded fallback/legacy path for this feature was reintroduced.

executionConstraints: Compose stacks include core stateful dependencies.
name: Local Dev Stack and Seed Baseline
rationale: Deterministic local startup is required for fast and reliable execution.
summary: Establish one-command local environment and realistic seed coverage.
